race.description: Brown Commercial Building F&M Mdn Plate
race.comment: TIGRONI (12) smart filly who looks to find her race at start seven. Just over a month between runs with a tough on-pace second over 1100m at this track on a heavy (8) surface. Regular rider hops back aboard and will prove hard to catch in this contest. RISING REVOLUTION (7) is yet to finish out of the money in three career starts and comes back in trip for this third-up. Took control early before being run down late to run second over 1200m at this track. Can get cover from the drawn and play a leading role. KISS OF GOLD (5) found the 900m too short second-up with a plugging third over 900m at Newcastle. Will appreciate the 3kg claim and good tempo. Expected to run well again. ASK DI (13) big improver second-up when she flashed late for a close-up fourth over 1000m at Kembla Grange. Conditions suit and stays in the mix.
